findings.summary: TypeScript project with esbuild, pnpm lockfile, Node >=18 engines field.
No dedicated /health or /healthz endpoint — has /metrics but no Azure health probe target.
findings.fix: Add a GET /health route that returns HTTP 200; configure as Azure health probe in scaffold.

findings.summary: Dockerfile uses BuildKit --mount=type=cache syntax (unsupported by ACR az acr build). Native modules (node-pty, gc-stats) require node-gyp compilation.
findings.fix: Scaffold will generate Dockerfile.azure without BuildKit directives for ACR compatibility.

warnings.detail: WeTTY serves /metrics via prom-client but has no dedicated liveness/readiness probe route. Azure health probes and load balancers need a lightweight 200-returning endpoint to avoid false restarts.
warnings.fix: Add GET /health route returning HTTP 200; configure as health probe in IaC.

warnings.summary: Dockerfile uses BuildKit syntax (--mount=type=cache) — unsupported by ACR az acr build.
warnings.detail: containers/wetty/Dockerfile uses --mount=type=cache in RUN directives (BuildKit-only). ACR's az acr build does not support BuildKit syntax and will fail. A Dockerfile.azure without these directives is needed.
warnings.fix: Generate Dockerfile.azure with plain RUN install commands, no --mount cache directives.

warnings.summary: Native Node.js modules detected: node-pty and gc-stats require node-gyp compilation.
warnings.detail: pnpm-lock.yaml contains node-gyp. The Dockerfile explicitly rebuilds node-pty and gc-stats native bindings. Container deployment is required (not App Service code-deploy). F1/Free tier is not viable.
warnings.fix: Deploy as a container image. Scaffold will target Azure Container Apps or App Service (container) with a B1+ SKU.

postDeployRecommendations.title: Add a dedicated SSH target container
postDeployRecommendations.reason: WeTTY proxies SSH to a host. In production, deploy a companion SSH container or point SSHHOST to a managed VM/container rather than relying on the default localhost fallback.

postDeployRecommendations.title: Enable SSL/TLS termination
postDeployRecommendations.reason: WeTTY supports SSL via --ssl-key/--ssl-cert options. In Azure, TLS termination at the ingress (Container Apps ingress or App Gateway) is recommended rather than in-process.
